# Issue Tracker: Linear + Scratchpad

Short issue records live in Linear. Local detailed planning lives in `.agentic-scaffold/.scratchpad/`.

## Conventions

- Keep Linear titles and descriptions short.
- Put detailed implementation plans in `.agentic-scaffold/.scratchpad/<feature-slug>/`.
- Link the Linear issue from the matching scratchpad file.
- Do not use issue comments as project memory.
- Shipped work summaries live in `.agentic-scaffold/.history/DD.MM.YYYY/README.md`.

## When a skill says "publish to the issue tracker"

Create or update the Linear issue, then create the matching local
detail file under `.agentic-scaffold/.scratchpad/<feature-slug>/`.

## When a skill says "fetch the relevant ticket"

Read the Linear issue summary and the matching `.agentic-scaffold/.scratchpad/`
detail file when one exists.
